zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet於1252年8月25日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托金頓時，他的父親Nicholas De Poyntz II32歲，母親Elizabeth Isabel Dyall28歲。他於1275年與Margaret de Paveley在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托金頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1307年1月4日在英國薩默塞特藍波特享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet于1252年8月25日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托金頓时，他的父亲Nicholas De Poyntz II32岁，母亲Elizabeth Isabel Dyall28岁。他于1275年与Margaret de Paveley在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托金頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1307年1月4日在英国薩默塞特藍波特享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet was born on 25 August 1252, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Nicholas De Poyntz II, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Isabel Dyall, was 28. He married Margaret de Paveley in 1275, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 4 January 1307, in Langport, Somerset, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet est né le 25 août 1252, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas De Poyntz II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabel Dyall, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Paveley en 1275, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1307, à Langport, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Maletが1252年8月25日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンで生まれた時，父Nicholas De Poyntz IIは32歳，母Elizabeth Isabel Dyallは28歳であった。1275年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンでMargaret de Paveleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1307年1月4日にイギリスソメルセトラングプオルトで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet(이)가 1252년 8월 25일 영국 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas De Poyntz II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabel Dyall(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 Margaret de Paveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 1월 4일 영국 서머세트 랭포트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet nasceu em 25 de agosto de 1252, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas De Poyntz II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isabel Dyall, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Paveley em 1275, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1307, em Langport, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Poyntz, 1st Baron of Curry Malet родился 25 августа 1252 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas De Poyntz II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabel Dyall, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Paveley в 1275 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 4 января 1307 г. в местности лангпорт, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret de Paveley en 1275, en Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
